import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut j = n - 1
  mut ok = true
  while i < j
    let a = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(c)
      c
    when None
      0
    end
    if a != b
      ok = false
    end
    i = i + 1
    j = j - 1
  end
  if ok
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end
